title: Wire Gauge Calculator - AWG Wire Size Chart
description: Free wire gauge calculator. Find wire diameter, cross-section area, and current capacity for AWG wire sizes. Includes AWG to mm conversion.
keywords: wire gauge calculator, AWG calculator, wire size chart, wire diameter, wire ampacity
intro: Look up wire properties by AWG gauge number. Find diameter, cross-section area, resistance, and maximum current capacity.

faq.a: AWG (American Wire Gauge) is a standardized system for wire sizes. Lower numbers mean thicker wire. AWG 0000 is the thickest standard size.

faq.q: How to choose the right wire gauge?
faq.a: Select based on current load and distance. Higher current or longer runs need thicker wire (lower AWG number) to prevent overheating and voltage drop.
